scripts.db:migrate: npm run db:migrate:001 && npm run db:migrate:002 && npm run db:migrate:003 && npm run db:migrate:004 && npm run db:migrate:005 && npm run db:migrate:006 && npm run db:migrate:007
scripts.db:seed: npx tsx scripts/gen-seed-passwords.ts && wrangler d1 execute boxme-payroll --file=../api/src/db/008_seed_ready.sql
scripts.db:migrate:local: npm run db:migrate:001 -- --local && npm run db:migrate:002 -- --local && npm run db:migrate:003 -- --local && npm run db:migrate:004 -- --local && npm run db:migrate:005 -- --local && npm run db:migrate:006 -- --local && npm run db:migrate:007 -- --local
scripts.db:seed:local: npx tsx scripts/gen-seed-passwords.ts && wrangler d1 execute boxme-payroll --local --file=../api/src/db/008_seed_ready.sql
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
